raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Waräüm tam Egiptes
Kehnineem/ un winna Kalpeem/
un winna Peel-Kungeem/ un
wiſſeem winna Lauduu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſeem/ kas prett
Wakara-Puſſi dſihwo/ un wiſ‐
ſeem Kehnineem eekſch tahs
Semmes Uz/ un wiſſeem Keh‐
nineem eeſch to Wilistern Sem‐
mes/ un Aſkalonam/ un Gasai/
un Ekronam/ un teem Atlikku‐
ſcheem no Asdodas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Gedomam/ un Moabam/
un teem Ammona Behrueem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſeem Kehnineem
no Tirus/ un wiſſeem Kehni‐
neem no Zihdonu/ teem Kehni‐
neem eeſch tahm Gallahm/ kas
wiannpuſs Juhraſ irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Dedanam/ un Teema‐
ram/ un Unfam/ un teem/ kas
tahtäs Malläs dſihwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſeem Kehnineem no
Arabiias/ un wiſſeem Kehnineem
no Wakara-Puſſes/ kas Tuſſ‐
neſi dſihwo.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſeem Kehnineem no
Simrus/ un wiſſeem Kehnineem
no Elama/ un wiſſeem Kehni‐
neem to Medern.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſeem Kehnineem no
Seemeta-Puſſes/ kas tuwn un
tahtu irr/ weenam tik labbi ka
ohtraiu. Ir wiſſahm Semmes
Walſtibahm/ kas wiſs Sem‐
mes irraid/ un tas Kehnisch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tew buhs us teem faſ‐
ziht: Ta fakka tas KUNGS Je‐
Zebaot/ tas Iſraëta Deewß:
Dserreet/ un peedſerreetees/ un
weinjeet/ un Erhiteet femmê/ ka
juhs atkaſ ne zettatees ta Soh‐
bina deht/ ko es juhsu Starpâ
fuhtitchu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee leegſees to
Bikkeri notawas Rehkas nemt/
un dſert/ tad buhs tew us teem
faſziht: Ta fakka tas KUNGS Je‐
baot: Teetchain juws buhs dſert.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo raugi/ es eejahku
moſziht eeſch ta Pilsjahta/ kas
pehz manna Wahrdn irr no‐
tauſts/ ktuhtat juhs tad ar Ne‐
noseedſibu nenoseedſigi turreti?
Juhs ne tapſeet nenoseedſigi
turreti/ jo es fanzu to Sohbinu
pahr wiſſeem Semmes Eedsih‐
wotajeem/ fakka tas KUNGS
Jebaot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad buhs tew wiſſus
ſchohs Wahrdus teem fluddi‐
naht/ un us teem faſziht: Tas
KUNGS ruhks no tahs Aug‐
ſtibas/ un pazels fawn Balſi no
tahs Mahju-Weetas tawas
Swehtibas/ Wiſsch ruhfdams
ruhks prett tawn Mahjas Wee‐
tu/ Wiſsch Breeka-Dseefnu
dſeedahs/ ka tee (Wihtna-) Min‐
neji/ prett wiſſeem Semmes Ee‐
dſihwotajeem/ ta Stanna ees
lihds Semmes Gallam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tam KUNGAM irr
Kilda ar teem Laudim/ Wiſsch
turrehs Teeſu ar wiſſu Mecsu/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
